name: Arrive Silver Spring
bathroomsNote: 2BR units: Bristol (1,108 sq ft) has 1+ baths; Concord (1,170 sq ft) and Chesapeake (1,300 sq ft) are 2 bed/2 bath

notes.concierge: Concierge desk confirmed; described in multiple sources as 24-hour service, but leasing office hours are Mon-Fri 9am-6pm, Sat 10am-5pm, Sun 12pm-5pm. No explicit documentation of 24-hour staffing found on official site.
notes.inUnitLaundry: In-unit washer/dryer in select/renovated units; some units may rely on shared laundry facilities
notes.petPolicy: $25/month per pet, max 2 pets, no deposit required; breed restrictions apply (pit bulls, rottweilers, German shepherds, others)
notes.climate: Central A/C and forced air heat listed; treated as in-unit controlled
notes.wellMaintained: Reviews are mixed: some residents report clean hallways and responsive maintenance; others cite chipped floors, dirty elevators, and slow repair response times. Unclear overall.
notes.transit: Red Line Metro (Silver Spring station) approximately 2 blocks away
